name: create-sentinelayer
description: Scaffold Sentinelayer spec/prompt/guide artifacts with secure browser auth and token bootstrap.

scripts.check: node --check bin/create-sentinelayer.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/legacy-cli.js && node --check src/commands/config.js && node --check src/config/service.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && npm pack --dry-run
